title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bajaj Finance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bajaj Finance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Bajaj Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bajaj Finance:
Bajaj Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Finance!
